description: Veronica, founder of Sepal, discusses how to keep crypto safe for beginners. She shares insights on the importance of mnemonic phrases and the risks associated with crypto ownership, highlighting real-life user cases and security practices.
topic_summary: In this presentation, Veronica covers essential strategies for crypto security, including the significance of mnemonic phrases and the common pitfalls beginners face. She emphasizes the need for proper knowledge in safeguarding digital assets, referencing user experiences and security measures like passphrases.
